title: AI Agent Kit Profile
description: Schema for profile YAML files in profiles/. Each profile belongs to exactly one axis and is allowed to populate only fields owned by that axis. This guarantees that merging profiles from different axes cannot overwrite each other.

_profile_name.description: Filename-safe name (must match the YAML basename without .yaml).

_profile_axis.description: Which axis this profile belongs to. Determines which top-level keys it may set.

oneOf.title: language axis
oneOf.description: Owns stack commands, lsp, formatter, and mcp.serena. Cardinality: exactly 1 per manifest.

code_quality.description: Language-level forbidden patterns (list-add). Avoid framework/security patterns here — those belong to framework or capability profiles.

oneOf.title: framework axis
oneOf.description: Owns ui and code_quality.forbidden_patterns. Cardinality: 0..N per manifest. Touching stack/lsp/formatter/provider/models/mcp is forbidden — those belong to other axes.

oneOf.title: provider axis
oneOf.description: Owns provider and models. Cardinality: exactly 1 per manifest. Must not touch any other field — the bug where ollama-cloud silently disabled kotlin-lsp came from violating this rule.

oneOf.title: capability axis
oneOf.description: Owns code_quality.forbidden_patterns (list-add). May also wire agent skills via the kit pipeline. Cardinality: 0..N per manifest.

oneOf.title: host axis
oneOf.description: Owns runtime/host platform settings (which template tree to render, which top-level config file to write, which agent frontmatter format to emit). Cardinality: 1..N per manifest — a project may run on OpenCode, Claude Code, or both simultaneously.

template_dir.description: Relative directory inside the kit repo whose contents are rendered into the target. Examples: '.opencode', '.claude'.

config_file.description: Path (relative to target root) of the top-level host config file rendered for this host. Examples: 'opencode.json', '.claude/settings.json'.

agent_format.description: Which frontmatter convention agent files in this host's template_dir use. Drives how INCLUDE-based bodies are wrapped.

instruction_file.description: Top-level project instruction file rendered for this host. OpenCode reads AGENTS.md; Claude Code reads CLAUDE.md (and treats it as the main-session orchestrator context).
